name: Mumbai

seo.title: Packers & Movers in Mumbai — 2,400+ Verified Vendors | ShiftIndia
seo.description: Compare 2,400+ verified packers and movers in Mumbai. Instant quotes starting ₹5,500. Live tracking, ₹5L damage protection, pay after delivery.

hero.title: Packers & Movers in Mumbai
hero.subtitle: Compare 2,400+ verified movers across Mumbai. Andheri to Navi Mumbai — instant quotes, zero drama.

intro:
Moving in Mumbai is a puzzle of narrow lanes, tall buildings, strict society rules and unforgiving traffic. ShiftIndia makes it simple — 2,400+ KYC-verified packers and movers across Mumbai, from Bandra and Andheri to Thane and Navi Mumbai, all ready to give you instant, itemised quotes.

Whether you're shifting from a studio in Powai to a 3 BHK in Worli, or moving out of Mumbai entirely, our platform shows you transparent prices, vendor ratings, and live tracking on every move.
whyUs: Mumbai's density is unlike any other Indian city. Our vendors are trained for narrow staircases, vintage buildings without lifts, strict security gate hours, and sudden monsoon reschedules. Every booking includes ₹5 lakh damage protection, GPS tracking, and the ability to pay after delivery.

faqs.q: How much do packers and movers charge in Mumbai?
faqs.a: Local 1 BHK moves start from ₹5,500. A 2 BHK move within Mumbai typically costs ₹9,000 – ₹16,000 depending on distance, floor and packing level.

faqs.q: Which areas in Mumbai do you cover?
faqs.a: All of Greater Mumbai including Andheri, Bandra, Juhu, Worli, Powai, Goregaon, Borivali, Thane, Navi Mumbai, Vashi, Kalyan and more.

faqs.q: Can you handle buildings without lifts?
faqs.a: Yes. Our vendors have trained crew for stair handling and charge transparent per-floor rates — no surprises.
We provide waterproof packing and tarp-covered trucks during monsoon months. Reschedule free up to 24 hours before.
